allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Mode:', d.get\('mode'\)\); print\('Results:', len\(d.get\('results',d.get\('sources',[]\)\)\)\); print\('Answer preview:', d.get\('answer',''\)[:200]\)")
Bash(rm -f api/stats.ts api/articles.ts api/mode.ts api/chat.ts api/wiki.ts api/kb-loader.ts api/debug.ts)

Bash(bun -e " import { readdir } from 'fs/promises'; const files = await readdir\('knowledge-base/raw/articles'\); const counts = {}; for \(const f of files.filter\(f => f.endsWith\('.md'\)\)\) { const date = f.slice\(0, 10\); counts[date] = \(counts[date] || 0\) + 1; } const sorted = Object.entries\(counts\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b[0].localeCompare\(a[0]\)\); console.log\('Total local articles:', files.filter\(f => f.endsWith\('.md'\)\).length\); for \(const [date, count] of sorted.slice\(0, 15\)\) console.log\(' ' + date + ': ' + count + ' articles'\); ")
Bash(bun -e "const d = JSON.parse\(await Bun.stdin.text\(\)\); for \(const r of d\) console.log\(r.slug\);")
Bash(bun -e "const d = JSON.parse\(await Bun.stdin.text\(\)\); for \(const r of d\) console.log\(r.slug, '→ date:', r.date\);")
Bash(bun -e "const d=JSON.parse\(await Bun.stdin.text\(\)\); for \(const r of d\) console.log\(r.date, '|', r.source, '|', r.title?.slice\(0,80\)\);")
Bash(bun -e "const d=JSON.parse\(await Bun.stdin.text\(\)\); console.log\('Vercel site total articles:', d.totalArticles\);")
Bash(bun -e "const d=JSON.parse\(await Bun.stdin.text\(\)\); for \(const r of d\) console.log\(r.date, '|', r.source, '|', r.slug\);")

Bash(bun -e "const d=JSON.parse\(await Bun.stdin.text\(\)\); if\(d.length===0\) console.log\('No 2026-04-07 articles'\); else { console.log\(d.length + ' new articles:'\); for \(const r of d\) console.log\('  ', r.slug, '|', r.source\); }")
